description: The finder_import function in the Finder module 6.x-1.x before 6.x-1.26, 7.x-1.x, and 7.x-2.x before 7.x-2.0-alpha8 for Drupal allows remote authenticated users with the administer finder permission to execute arbitrary PHP code via admin/build/finder/import.
